title: Vanished in the Desert: The Fate of the Missing Hikers

scenes.text: Three hikers ventured into the wilderness and never returned.
The disappearance took place in Joshua Tree National Park, California.
In 1999, three experienced hikers went missing without a trace during a routine trek.
Despite extensive search efforts, no evidence of their fate has ever been found.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Joshua Tree, USA - 1999. Three hikers set out for a routine hike but never returned, leaving their families and search teams in despair. Follow for daily cold cases!
